.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for path creation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with Java 21.
Change the Maven compiler release property from Java 17 to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will target Java 17 instead of Java 21, failing to utilize new language features or potentially causing runtime issues if the application relies on JDK 21 specific behaviors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the release version to 21 in the maven-compiler-plugin configuration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this, the plugin might not correctly enforce the Java 21 target level if other configurations override the property, leading to compilation against the wrong JDK version.
